## PADRÕES DECISÓRIOS ESTABELECIDOS

| ID | Situação | Decisão | Confiança | Fonte |
|----|----------|---------|-----------|-------|
| PD-RL-001 | Candidato forte tecnicamente mas drena energia | Não contratar — incompatibilidade é bloqueante | ALTA | ^[RL001_004, RL001_005] |
| PD-RL-002 | Candidato score 7 no scorecard | Eliminar — 7 não existe | ALTA | ^[RL001_016] |
| PD-RL-003 | Processo sem nenhum Hell Yes candidato | Contratar ninguém e reiniciar | ALTA | ^[RL001_018] |
| PD-RL-004 | Alinhamento salarial pendente | Discutir no primeiro phone screen | ALTA | ^[RL001_019] |
| PD-RL-005 | Problema trazido à liderança sem pesquisa | Pedir 1-3-1 antes de responder | ALTA | ^[RL001_010] |
| PD-RL-006 | Gossip detectado na equipe | Intervenção pública imediata com as partes | ALTA | ^[RL001_013] |
| PD-RL-007 | Assessment de candidato | Pagar $1-2k por trabalho real (4-8h) | ALTA | ^[RL001_017] |
| PD-RL-008 | Definir critérios de contratação | Começar com cenários WHO, não traits abstratos | ALTA | ^[RL001_008] |

## INSIGHTS POR TAG

### [FILOSOFIA] — 6 insights
**^[FILOSOFIAS.yaml: F-RL-001 a F-RL-006]**

| ID | Insight | Chunk |
|----|---------|-------|
| INS-RL-001 | Founder First Hiring: Companies move at the speed of the founder | RL001_004 |
| INS-RL-015 | Scalable's 5 Core Values: Love entrepreneurs, Batteries included, Raise the bar, Do the dishes, Seek the why | RL001_014 |
| INS-RL-016 | Richard's Non-Negotiables: Batteries Included + Do the Dishes. Entitlement = immediate conflict | RL001_015 |
| INS-RL-017 | Batteries Included: doesn't REQUIRE praise/reward to perform. Intrinsic motivation | RL001_009 |
| INS-RL-022 | Frameworks Born From Failure: 21+ frameworks from 17 companies, not from theory | RL001_022 |
| INS-RL-028 | Cultural Legacy Transmission: values press down into company and persist even after exit | RL001_013 |

### [MODELO-MENTAL] — 6 insights
**^[MODELOS-MENTAIS.yaml: MM-RL-001 a MM-RL-006]**

| ID | Insight | Chunk |
|----|---------|-------|
| INS-RL-002 | Competency + Compatibility (not OR): must have BOTH | RL001_005 |
| INS-RL-011 | Richard's Trust Builders (Matt Swan): Batteries included, knows numbers, follow-through, proactive communication | RL001_009 |
| INS-RL-012 | Richard's Trust Breakers: Hidden agenda, lack of proactive comm, lack of humility, unpredictable behavior, gossip | RL001_012 |
| INS-RL-018 | Three Hiring Problems Every Founder Faces: Time consuming, Costly (bad hire self-deception), Overwhelm cascade | RL001_001 |
| INS-RL-019 | Overwhelm Cascade: Bad hires → jaded founder → overloads competent person → high performers leave | RL001_003 |
| INS-RL-020 | Bad Hire Self-Deception: We ignore gut red flags because we can't articulate WHY on paper | RL001_002 |
| INS-RL-023 | Richard's Self-Profile (INTJ): High Discernment + Tenacity, Low Wonderment + Enablement | RL001_007 |

### [HEURISTICA] — 8 insights
**^[HEURISTICAS.yaml: H-RL-001 a H-RL-008]**

| ID | Insight | Chunk |
|----|---------|-------|
| INS-RL-003 | Hell Yes or No: If it's not a hell yes, it's a no. No 7s | RL001_006 |
| INS-RL-007 | Hiring No One is Acceptable: Reiniciar é melhor que contratar por dor | RL001_018 |
| INS-RL-008 | Salary Transparency Upfront: Share range on first phone screen | RL001_019 |
| INS-RL-009 | Assessment Timing + WHY Communication: "grass is true green, not spray-on" | RL001_020 |
| INS-RL-014 | Gossip Dies Here Protocol: Leadership forces immediate confrontation | RL001_013 |
| INS-RL-024 | Paid Skills Assessment ($1-2k): Triple win | RL001_017 |
| INS-RL-025 | Scorecard No-Sevens Rule: Seven = optimistic 6 or pessimistic 8 | RL001_016 |
| INS-RL-026 | Phone Screen Basics First: Confirm critical alignment in 10 minutes | RL001_017 |
| INS-RL-027 | Panel Interview Compatibility Check: Team members spot dynamics founder might miss | RL001_017 |

| ID | Insight | Chunk |
|----|---------|-------|
| INS-RL-004 | Work Style Assessment Trinity: DISC + CliftonStrengths + Working Genius | RL001_007 |

### [METODOLOGIA] — 4 insights
**^[METODOLOGIAS.yaml: MET-RL-001 a MET-RL-004]**

| ID | Insight | Chunk |
|----|---------|-------|
| INS-RL-005 | Trust Builder Discovery: 3 WHO scenarios → extract common traits | RL001_008 |
| INS-RL-006 | Trust Breaker Discovery: 3 inverted WHO scenarios → extract anti-patterns | RL001_011 |
| INS-RL-010 | Multi-Stage Interview Process (5 stages) | RL001_017 |
| INS-RL-013 | 1-3-1 Escalation Format: 1 problem + 3 solutions + 1 recommendation | RL001_010 |

## CITAÇÕES ÂNCORA (TOP 10)

1. "Companies move at the speed of the founder." ^[RL001_004]
2. "If it's not a hell yes, it's a no." ^[RL001_006]
3. "Sevens are total BS. Seven is the number we go to when we aren't willing to commit." ^[RL001_016]
4. "An acceptable outcome of an open hire is we hire NO ONE." ^[RL001_018]
5. "This is not 'go buy friends.'" ^[RL001_005]
6. "All of our processes were born from failure." ^[RL001_022]
7. "You know how many people gossip after that? None." ^[RL001_013]
8. "Let's make sure the grass is true green, not spray-on stuff." ^[RL001_020]
9. "Don't think trait first. Think WHO first." ^[RL001_008]
10. "Seventh interview. Should have been handled on first phone call." ^[RL001_019]
